utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You had no right to tell me you ever had feelings for me .

emotion_cause.span: 1_tell me you ever had feelings for me

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I was doing great with Julie before I found out about you .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hey , I was doing great before I found out about you . You think it is easy for me to see you with Julie ?
